tasks.title: Build watchmebuildai.com
tasks.description: Build the complete watchmebuildai.com static site — landing page, subscription flow via Polar.sh, Discord role gating via PHP webhook, session calendar, member portal (recorded sessions), and Brevo email integration.
tasks.plan:
## Overview

Build the full watchmebuildai.com platform: a static marketing site that converts Stage 1 AIStudio.com visitors into $100/month Stage 2 subscribers. Polar.sh handles billing; a PHP webhook at /webhooks/polar.php grants/revokes the Discord Subscriber role and syncs contacts to Brevo. The site includes a landing page, admin calendar interface, and subscriber-gated member portal.

## Phases

1. Infrastructure & Manual Setup — Discord server, Polar.sh product, Google Calendar, Brevo list (all manual, no code)
2. PHP Webhook — /webhooks/polar.php handles Polar.sh lifecycle events, Discord role sync, Brevo sync
3. Landing Page — Hero, value prop, Stage 2 framing, Polar.sh CTA, Google Calendar embed
4. Admin Calendar Interface — Password-protected PHP page to manage session schedule and recordings
5. Member Portal — Discord OAuth-gated page showing recorded sessions and Discord invite
6. Deploy & End-to-End Validation — Full subscriber flow test

## First Proof Unit

Discord server correctly configured. Expected: test account with Subscriber role can access private Stage Channel; without role, cannot. Verify: manual — create test account, grant role, confirm Stage Channel access, remove role, confirm access removed.

proofUnits.title: Discord server correctly configured
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: A test account with the Subscriber role can access the private Stage Channel; without the role, it cannot.
proofUnits.exactCommand: 1. Create test Discord account. 2. Manually grant Subscriber role. 3. Verify Stage Channel access. 4. Remove role. 5. Verify Stage Channel disappears. 6. Confirm Discord bot is online with Manage Roles permission.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: Server does not exist; Stage Channel is public; bot offline or lacks Manage Roles permission.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Role-gated Stage Channel confirmed working; bot online with correct permissions; role hierarchy correct.
proofUnits.waiverGuidance: N/A — manual verification is the only option for Discord server configuration.

proofUnits.title: Polar.sh subscription is live
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: The Polar.sh checkout URL shows the $100/month subscription with 7-day free trial.
proofUnits.exactCommand: 1. Navigate to Polar.sh checkout URL. 2. Verify product name, price ($100/month), and trial (7 days). 3. Confirm webhook endpoint is set to https://watchmebuildai.com/webhooks/polar.php. 4. Record HMAC secret.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: No Polar.sh product configured; checkout URL returns 404.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Checkout shows correct product and pricing; webhook URL saved in Polar.sh dashboard.

proofUnits.title: Polar.sh webhook grants Discord role and syncs Brevo
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: On subscription.created, polar.php verifies HMAC signature, grants Subscriber Discord role, and creates Brevo contact.
proofUnits.exactCommand: 1. Deploy polar.php. 2. Use Polar.sh dashboard → Webhooks → Send test event (subscription.created). 3. Verify HTTP 200 response. 4. Confirm Subscriber role appears on test Discord user. 5. Confirm new contact in Brevo list.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: /webhooks/polar.php returns 404 or HMAC check fails; Discord or Brevo API calls fail.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: HTTP 200 response; Discord Subscriber role granted; Brevo contact created with correct tags.

proofUnits.title: Landing page renders and subscribe CTA works
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Landing page loads with all sections visible and subscribe CTA links to Polar.sh checkout.
proofUnits.exactCommand: 1. Open https://watchmebuildai.com in browser. 2. Verify hero, value prop, and pricing sections render. 3. Click Subscribe CTA — confirm Polar.sh checkout opens. 4. Verify Google Calendar embed is visible. 5. Verify sessions from sessions.json render. 6. DevTools → Console — no JavaScript errors.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: Site returns 404; CTA links to wrong URL; console errors present.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: All sections render; CTA links to Polar.sh; calendar embed visible; no console errors.

proofUnits.title: Admin interface saves session and recording data
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Scott can log into /admin/, add a session entry, and it appears in sessions.json and on the landing page.
proofUnits.exactCommand: 1. Navigate to https://watchmebuildai.com/admin/. 2. Enter password — confirm access. 3. Add test session (date, title, description). 4. Submit form; verify entry in /data/sessions.json. 5. Reload landing page — confirm session appears. 6. Add recording with YouTube URL; verify in /data/recordings.json.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: /admin/ returns 404; no password protection; save.php fails to write JSON.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Login works; session and recording entries save correctly; both visible in respective JSON files and on landing page.

proofUnits.title: Member portal gates by Discord subscription status
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: A subscriber with the Subscriber Discord role sees the recorded session library; a non-subscriber is redirected to the landing page.
proofUnits.exactCommand: 1. Navigate to https://watchmebuildai.com/portal/. 2. Log in via Discord OAuth with subscriber account. 3. Verify recorded sessions and Discord invite render. 4. Clear session cookie. 5. Log in with non-subscriber account. 6. Confirm redirect to https://watchmebuildai.com/.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: /portal/ returns 404; OAuth flow fails; no role check performed.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Subscriber sees recordings and Discord invite; non-subscriber is redirected; OAuth completes without errors.

proofUnits.title: Full end-to-end subscriber flow
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: New user completes entire journey from landing page to live Discord session access without manual intervention from Scott.
proofUnits.exactCommand: 1. Open https://watchmebuildai.com as fresh visitor. 2. Click Start Free Trial → complete Polar.sh checkout with test email. 3. Verify Brevo onboarding email arrives. 4. Confirm Subscriber role on test Discord account. 5. Navigate to /portal/ — confirm access. 6. Join Discord Stage Channel — confirm access. 7. Simulate subscription.canceled in Polar.sh dashboard — confirm role revoked and Brevo contact tagged churned. 8. Trigger trial expiry in Polar.sh dashboard — confirm portal and Discord access revoked.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: Any step in the flow fails; role not granted; portal inaccessible; Brevo email not sent.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: All 8 steps complete without error; Scott takes no manual action at any step.
proofUnits.waiverGuidance: Step 8 trial expiry must be triggered manually in Polar.sh dashboard — waiting 7 days is impractical during testing.
